case_title: YOSHIKO LAWRENCE VS. ROCK STAR PARKING

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE, YOSHIKO AS TO DEFENDANT ROCK STAR PARKING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY LAWRENCE, YOSHIKO AS TO DEFENDANT ROCK STAR PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED SEP-10-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROCK STAR PARKING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROCK STAR PARKING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY PAUL BLANDINO--VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2013 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE, YOSHIKO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROCK STAR PARKING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
